codeReview.summary: Documentation implementation fully meets feature requirements. Three comprehensive documentation files created: widget-attributes.md (226 lines, 10 attributes documented), cli-reference.md (670 lines, 24 commands documented), and self-hosting.md (395 lines, 7810 bytes). All documentation follows consistent markdown formatting with proper tables, code examples, and hierarchical structure.

summary: Documentation feature fully implemented and verified. Widget attributes reference covers all 10 data-* attributes with description, valid values, defaults, and examples. CLI reference documents 24 commands (exceeding 21 requirement) with usage syntax, flags, and examples. Self-hosting guide is comprehensive at 7810 bytes with prerequisites, step-by-step setup, configuration reference, API endpoints, database schema, monitoring, troubleshooting, cost estimates, and security considerations. All verification steps passed.
